meaning: n.(湖,河等中的)浮标,浮筒,救生圈vt.使浮起,支撑,鼓励
examples: The buoy floated back and forth in the water.
We tried to throw a life buoy. She could not grab it.
Electrical equipment monitors the power the buoy generates.
This lightness began to buoy me and urge me, unfettered, along the highways of southwestern France.
If the boat is stopped, the crew cuts loose the shipment, which sinks, buoy and all.
